name: 𐔌 Baby Daddy Suguru Geto .ᐟ ֹ ₊ ꒱
description:
♡ CW: angst, pregnancy, breakup, ex bf!Suguru ♡

˚ ༘♱·˚꒰It's just me these days, I can't say I'm great. I can't stop seein' your face on all these ceilings꒱ ₊˚ˑ༄

Two years ago, he left to pursue his dreams. Two years ago, he broke your heart. You called out for him, begged, pleaded for him to listen, but he refused, and as you found yourself alone and scared, it only became worse when you held that positive pregnancy test.

A thousand missed calls only got you a block. He turned his back to him, so couldn't even tell him the news. You thought for months, trying to reach out, to tell him that yes, he was going to be a father... until you stopped. Resignation filled your chest, and you realized that yes, you were alone, and no, it won't stop you. Now that he's back, now that he sees you... he needs to know. Suguru knows he doesn't have the right, but he will be the one begging this time if he needs to.

♡ Bot info: Suguru is 24 years old. He graduated from Law School (yeah, again hehe) with a minor degree in Criminal Justice. He moved back to his hometown to settle down again, he already has a job prospect and a new apartment.

♡ Scenario: Suguru returns and finds you with a baby. The guilt of his past mistakes is weighing on him. Suguru needs to know if that baby is his. Baby is a boy and close to one year—one full year! Depends on dates you pick.

♡ Time set: Modern AU/Non Sorcerer AU!

♡ User's info: femPOV, you are around 22-24 years. You have a baby boy that is the exact same copy as Suguru. You can do the backstory (for example, I lived alone in an apartment but had my family's support while testing the bot).

♡ Art by: I couldn't find the artist but I'll keep looking, so I'll update it when necessary!

♡ Total: 1981 tokens. Permanent: 1038 tokens

━━━━━━☆━━━━━━

♡ Anya's letters

Another Sugubear bot hehe... sorry guys, you know how much I love him! He is so perfect. FUN FACT!!! This is actually a bot I did back in October 2024, and I was supposed to post it back then but I just decided to keep him private because I loved him so much. You guys don't get it, we are in love and we share love and a toothbrush 🤞🏻.

This is the second Suguru bot I do with a Joji song because THEY FUCKING FIT SO WELL. Suguru is so Joji coded guys, please hear me out...

Anywayssss, I know I always say my Sugubear bots are my favorite but they really are, I hope it shows how much love and care I put into these bots. Writing has always been a hobby of mine and sharing it makes me so happy.

In other news... thank you so much for 300 followers!! Oh my god I can't believe it hehe. This is so nice and thank you so much, I'm grateful for every nice review and comment, because when you guys say nice and supportive things to me it makes me smile and feel appreciated tbh. I'm glad my little thoughts can be fun and entertaining to you. Ok imma stfu right now hehe. I'm really happy too because my Geto figure (THE ONE FROM MY PFP) just got delivered!!! Imma spam the shit out of him on my discord server hehe so you guys should go and see him.

☆ Anya's recommendation of the botday!

Today I recommend the creator
creator: Devil'sAdvocate
